description: Decision Transformer schema v1 — defines the expected state and action feature spaces for training and inference.

state_features.name: cycle_index
state_features.description: The current cycle index within the episode.

state_features.name: pattern_safe_degrade
state_features.description: Indicates whether a safe degradation pattern is active.

state_features.name: reward_to_go
state_features.description: Cumulative reward remaining from this timestep to episode end.

state_features.name: timestep
state_features.description: Position index within the context window.

state_features.name: governor_*
state_features.description: Dynamic governor metric captured at runtime. Matches any feature prefixed with governor_.

action_features.name: action_index
action_features.description: Index of the discrete action taken.

action_features.name: action_confidence
action_features.description: Model confidence score for the selected action.

action_features.name: action_param_*
action_features.description: Dynamic action parameter. Matches any feature prefixed with action_param_.
